title: Login Issue
description: Customer unable to login with valid credentials.

title: Payment Failed
description: Payment not going through for premium plan.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer requested dark mode for the dashboard.

title: Bug: Profile Picture Not Uploading
description: Uploading profile picture fails with error 500.

title: Account Deletion Request
description: Customer wants to delete their account permanently.

title: Unable to Reset Password
description: Password reset link not working for some users.

title: Error 404 on Dashboard
description: Some users see 404 error after login.

title: Report Export Not Working
description: Exporting reports to CSV gives empty file.

title: UI Issue: Overlapping Buttons
description: Buttons on settings page overlap on small screens.

title: Subscription Renewal Problem
description: Automatic subscription renewal failed for customer.

title: Notification Email Not Received
description: Customer did not receive password reset email.

title: App Crash on iOS
description: App crashes immediately on launch for iOS 16 users.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: Customer billed twice for the same month.

title: Language Settings Not Saving
description: Changes in language preferences do not persist.

title: Dashboard Loading Slowly
description: Dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load for some users.
